description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a decorative crown molding at the top and a base with carved floral details. The front features a large mirrored door, framed by wood, with ornate carvings at the bottom. The sides are plain, with subtle wood grain visible and a handle for opening the door. The back of the cabinet reveals three open shelves, providing ample storage space for various items. The wood has a light, weathered finish, giving it a rustic yet elegant appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, smooth surface and a classic design suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A tall, rustic wooden cabinet with a mirrored front door, carved floral details, and open shelves at the back. The light wood finish and sturdy build give it an elegant, classic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large mirrored door with ornate carvings at the bottom and a decorative crown molding.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plain wood panel with a handle and visible wood grain, highlighting the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Back view displays three open shelves and the interior storage space, with the same light wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the plain wood panel and handle.
